_meta.description: Production retrieval quality baseline — captured before RAG initiative implementation begins
_meta.initiative: RAG and Agentic System Architecture Initiative
_meta.purpose: Floor: no phase may land below these values. Pathway migration (P0.1) must not regress these metrics.

nDCG_at_5.description: Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain at rank 5 — quality of ranked result ordering

MRR.description: Mean Reciprocal Rank — how quickly the first relevant result appears

P_at_5.description: Precision at rank 5 — fraction of top-5 results that are relevant

R_at_5.description: Recall at rank 5 — all relevant docs found within top-5

floors.note: Hard floor — any phase that drops nDCG@5 below 0.90 is a blocking regression. Pathway migration requires nDCG@5 >= 0.90 on pilot scope (P3.6) and >= 0.925 across all scopes (P4 exit gate).

w_series_outcomes.W2_hybrid_BM25_dense: frozen — insufficient improvement on pilot corpus; reopen gate requires >= 3% nDCG@5 delta on post-Pathway corpus
w_series_outcomes.W4_reranking_gpt4o_mini_listwise: rejected — resulted in nDCG@5 regression of -0.1238
